O

onRegister(SeasonsApi) - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.lifesteal.seasons.api.SeasonsIntegration
Called when the integration is registered with EzSeasons.
onUnregister() - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.lifesteal.seasons.api.SeasonsIntegration
Called when the integration is unregistered from EzSeasons.

R

registerIntegration(SeasonsIntegration) - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.lifesteal.seasons.api.SeasonsApi
Registers a plugin integration with EzSeasons.

S

SeasonResetEvent - Class in com.skyblockexp.lifesteal.seasons.api.events
Fired whenever EzSeasons performs a season reset.
SeasonResetEvent(long, long, long, String) - Constructor for class com.skyblockexp.lifesteal.seasons.api.events.SeasonResetEvent
Constructs a new season reset event snapshot.
SeasonsApi - Interface in com.skyblockexp.lifesteal.seasons.api
Public API exposed by EzSeasons so companion plugins can register for season events and features.
SeasonsIntegration - Interface in com.skyblockexp.lifesteal.seasons.api
Interface for plugins to implement to integrate with EzSeasons.
SeasonsIntegrationRegisteredEvent - Class in com.skyblockexp.lifesteal.seasons.api.events
Fired when a SeasonsIntegration is registered through SeasonsApi.
SeasonsIntegrationRegisteredEvent(SeasonsApi, SeasonsIntegration) - Constructor for class com.skyblockexp.lifesteal.seasons.api.events.SeasonsIntegrationRegisteredEvent
Constructs a new integration-registered event.
SeasonsIntegrationUnregisteredEvent - Class in com.skyblockexp.lifesteal.seasons.api.events
Fired when a SeasonsIntegration is unregistered through SeasonsApi.
SeasonsIntegrationUnregisteredEvent(SeasonsApi, SeasonsIntegration) - Constructor for class com.skyblockexp.lifesteal.seasons.api.events.SeasonsIntegrationUnregisteredEvent
Constructs a new integration-unregistered event.

T

triggerSeasonReset(String) - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.lifesteal.seasons.api.SeasonsApi
Triggers a season reset immediately and emits SeasonResetEvent.

U

unregisterIntegration(SeasonsIntegration) - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.lifesteal.seasons.api.SeasonsApi
Unregisters a previously registered integration.
